title: Triplewax Dash Shine 500 ml – Cleans & Restores Dashboard with Anti-Static Finish (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
POWERFUL DIRT AND GRIME REMOVAL: Triplewax Dash Shine effortlessly eliminates ingrained dirt and grime from dashboards and interior plastic trim, ensuring a pristine and clean appearance.
SATIN FINISH: Achieve a natural new look with a rich satin finish that enhances the aesthetics of your vehicle's interior, providing a fresh and revitalized appearance.
REFRESHING CITRUS FRAGRANCE: Experience a refreshing burst of citrus fragrance as Triplewax Dash Shine not only cleans but also leaves your vehicle's interior smelling delightful after each use.

ADVANCED PROTECTION: The silicone-free, water-based formula offers advanced protection, guarding against drying, cracking, and fading. Preserve the longevity of your interior surfaces with this effective protective solution.
IDEAL FOR MODERN VEHICLES: Tailored for the needs of modern vehicles, Triplewax Dash Shine is the perfect choice to maintain and protect your car's dashboard and interior plastic trim.
